cast.name: 蕾切尔·布鲁姆 Rachel Bloom
吉莉安·罗伯斯比尔 Gillian Robespierre
阿德里安娜·巴比欧 Adrienne Barbeau
坦妮娅·萨拉乔 Tanya Saracho
达娜·史蒂文斯 Dana Stevens

introduction: Hollywood Does Abortion is a deep dive into the depiction of abortion in film and television, revealing how flawed portrayals–that it is unsafe, rare, or easy to access–contributed to persistent misperceptions that impact attitudes and public policy. Extensive archival imagery spans a plethora of television and film, ranging from Maude and Dirty Dancing to Jane the Virgin and Juno, and creates a historical timeline to support the “story” of the film. Leading directors, writers, showrunners, and cultural critics share their personal and political reactions to these seminal depictions through the lens of today’s post-Roe world.
